languages.text: {n}Ответ на загадку, представшую перед вашими глазами, {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Mind}приходит вам на ум{/d} сразу же. Патент не мог пропасть сам — его могли только украсть. Некто, обладающий столь ошеломляющим могуществом, что его не остановила ни одна мера предосторожности. Некто, кто уже проявил себя на поприще великого вора, украв у династии фон Валанциус самого Вольного Торговца. Тразин Неисчилимый.{/n}

{n}The answer to the enigma before your eyes {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Mind}comes to you immediately{/d}. The Warrant could not have vanished on its own. It could only have been stolen. By someone possessed of such staggering power that no amount of precautions could stop them. By someone who has already proven themselves a great thief, having stolen the Rogue Trader himself from the von Valancius dynasty. Trazyn the Infinite.{/n}

languages.text: {n}眼前这谜题的答案{d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Mind}立即浮上你的心头{/d}。贸易授状不可能自己消失，只可能是被人偷走的。而那人的力量恐怖如斯，无论多少防范措施都无法阻挡。那人是名副其实的大盗，甚至曾经将行商浪人本人从冯·瓦兰修斯王朝偷走。那人就是无限者特拉金。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The answer to the enigma before your eyes {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Mind}comes to you immediately{/d}. The Warrant could not have vanished on its own. It could only have been stolen. By someone possessed of such staggering power that no amount of precautions could stop them. By someone who has already proven themselves a great thief, having stolen the Rogue Trader himself from the von Valancius dynasty. Trazyn the Infinite.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}眼前这谜题的答案{d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Mind}立即浮上你的心头{/d}。贸易授状不可能自己消失，只可能是被人偷走的。而那人的力量恐怖如斯，无论多少防范措施都无法阻挡。那人是名副其实的大盗，甚至曾经将行商浪人本人从冯·瓦兰修斯王朝偷走。那人就是无限者特拉金。{/n}

languages.text: {n}La respuesta al enigma que tienes delante {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Mind}te llega inmediatamente{/d}. La Patente no puede desaparecer sola. La han robado. La ha robado alguien con un poder tan abrumador como para sortear cualquier medida preventiva posible. Alguien que ya ha demostrado su gran capacidad para el robo al arrebatar a la dinastía von Valancius a su Comerciante Independiente. Trazyn el Infinito.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The answer to the enigma before your eyes {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Mind}comes to you immediately{/d}. The Warrant could not have vanished on its own. It could only have been stolen. By someone possessed of such staggering power that no amount of precautions could stop them. By someone who has already proven themselves a great thief, having stolen the Rogue Trader himself from the von Valancius dynasty. Trazyn the Infinite.{/n}

La ha robado alguien con un poder tan abrumador como para sortear cualquier medida preventiva posible. Alguien que ya ha demostrado su gran capacidad para el robo al arrebatar a la dinastía von Valancius a su Comerciante Independiente. Trazyn el Infinito.{/n}

languages.text: {n}La réponse à l'énigme que vous avez devant vous {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Mind}s'impose aussitôt{/d} : la lettre de marque ne s'est pas volatilisée, elle a été volée. Par quelqu'un possédant un pouvoir suffisant pour passer outre toute les protections mises en place. Par quelqu'un qui a déjà prouvé ses talents de voleur en dérobant le libre-marchand de la dynastie von Valancius lui-même. Trazyn l'Infini.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The answer to the enigma before your eyes {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Mind}comes to you immediately{/d}. The Warrant could not have vanished on its own. It could only have been stolen. By someone possessed of such staggering power that no amount of precautions could stop them. By someone who has already proven themselves a great thief, having stolen the Rogue Trader himself from the von Valancius dynasty. Trazyn the Infinite.{/n}

Par quelqu'un qui a déjà prouvé ses talents de voleur en dérobant le libre-marchand de la dynastie von Valancius lui-même. Trazyn l'Infini.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Gözlerinin önündeki muammanın cevabı, {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Mind}anında zihnine üşüşüyor{/d}. Ruhsatname, kendi kendine yok olmuş olamaz. Sadece çalınmış olabilir. Hiçbir önlemin durduramayacağı kadar şaşırtıcı bir güce sahip biri tarafından. Bizzat Hür Tacir'i, von Valancius hanedanlığından çalarak harika bir hırsız olduğunu çoktan kanıtlamış biri tarafından. Mutlak Trazyn.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The answer to the enigma before your eyes {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Mind}comes to you immediately{/d}. The Warrant could not have vanished on its own. It could only have been stolen. By someone possessed of such staggering power that no amount of precautions could stop them. By someone who has already proven themselves a great thief, having stolen the Rogue Trader himself from the von Valancius dynasty. Trazyn the Infinite.{/n}

Hiçbir önlemin durduramayacağı kadar şaşırtıcı bir güce sahip biri tarafından. Bizzat Hür Tacir'i, von Valancius hanedanlığından çalarak harika bir hırsız olduğunu çoktan kanıtlamış biri tarafından. Mutlak Trazyn.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Antwort auf das Mysterium vor deinen Augen {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Mind}kommt dir augenblicklich{/d} in den Sinn. Der Handelsbrief kann nicht von allein verschwunden sein. Jemand muss ihn gestohlen haben. Jemand, der mächtig genug ist, dass ihn keine Vorsichtsmaßnahmen aufhalten konnten. Jemand, der sich bereits als geschickter Dieb erwiesen und der Dynastie derer von Valancius den Freihändler selbst gestohlen hat. Trazyn der Unendliche.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The answer to the enigma before your eyes {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Mind}comes to you immediately{/d}. The Warrant could not have vanished on its own. It could only have been stolen. By someone possessed of such staggering power that no amount of precautions could stop them. By someone who has already proven themselves a great thief, having stolen the Rogue Trader himself from the von Valancius dynasty. Trazyn the Infinite.{/n}

Der Handelsbrief kann nicht von allein verschwunden sein. Jemand muss ihn gestohlen haben. Jemand, der mächtig genug ist, dass ihn keine Vorsichtsmaßnahmen aufhalten konnten. Jemand, der sich bereits als geschickter Dieb erwiesen und der Dynastie derer von Valancius den Freihändler selbst gestohlen hat. Trazyn der Unendliche.{/n}

languages.text: {n}目の前の謎の{d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Mind}答えはすぐにわかる{/d}。この証書は自力で消えることはなかった。盗まれたのだ。その盗みは、どんな用心も防ぐほどの驚異的な力を持つ者によるものだった。すでに盗賊王を盗み出した、フォン・ヴァランシウス家から。無限のトラズンである。{/n}
